description: Scans your Fabric tenant and builds a relationship graph from workspace(s). Three layers: properties (fast), --deep (definition scanning), --include-connections (API connections). Output includes a meta envelope with freshness signals and edges with confidence scores.
notes: The graph file contains: nodes (id, type, name, workspaceId), edges (source, target, relationship, confidence, discoveryMethod), workspaces, summary, and meta (scannedAt, scanDurationMs, etag, partial, scope). Edge confidence: high (structured property, connection API), medium (classified definition ref), low (generic GUID scan). The etag is a SHA-256 hash of sorted (id, name) pairs — agents can compare etags to detect workspace drift without a full re-scan. Use --summary-only for a lightweight inventory probe. Use --resolve Type:Name for fast name-to-ID lookups. Use --focus <id> --depth N for ego-centric subgraphs.

query_examples.description: Get content fingerprint for drift detection.
